message:
✨ Add inline mission title rename from chat header (#2628)

Allow users to rename mission titles directly from the chat header by
clicking a pencil icon that appears on hover. Enter/blur saves, Escape
cancels. Titles are trimmed and validated (1-80 chars).

- Add renameMission() to MissionContext (persists via localStorage)
- Add inline edit UI with save/cancel controls in MissionChat header
- Title change reflects in mission list, chat header, and saved library

Fixes #2604

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
